items.title: Another major stock exchange moves toward 24-hour trading
items.description: Investors’ ability to trade around the clock and across the globe took another step closer on Tuesday after the London Stock Exchange said it would start a new 24-hour trading venue.

items.title: China contemplates tit-for-tat  export controls against U.S. on AI technologies: report
items.description: It could be a direct response to U.S. steps, it could be diplomatic posturing but competition between the U.S. and China for AI supremacy is hotting up.

items.title: Montana home of Kelly Clarkson’s late ex-husband Brandon Blackstock listed for $2.9 million
items.description: The sprawling Montana lodge where Kelly Clarkson’s late ex-husband moved to after they split for sale for $2.9 million—a year after the talent manager died following a battle with cancer.

items.title: Oil prices could surpass $120 per barrel if disruptions in Strait of Hormuz don’t ease, says Goldman Sachs
items.description: Analysts at the investment bank, led by Daan Struyven, see oil prices averaging $100 a barrel next year if traffic continues to be affected through the waterway.

items.title: Jamie Dimon says he wouldn’t buy Treasurys. ‘I don’t understand the upside.’
items.description: Jamie Dimon — long considered a potential candidate to be treasury secretary, and the person in charge of one of the nation’s primary dealers of Treasury securities — says he wouldn’t buy American deb

items.title: Your healthcare could now cost $185,500 in retirement — and that doesn’t include long-term care
items.description: Rising prices for care and managing chronic conditions helped drive up the forecast.

items.title: U.S. hits Canada with stiff new tariffs, escalating trade tensions
items.description: The Trump administration on Monday said it would slap 50% tariffs on some goods imported from Canada, in an effort to end what it sees as discriminatory trade practices by Ottawa against the U.S. auto

items.title: I racked up $35,000 in credit-card debt. Should I file for bankruptcy?
items.description: “I’m also considering working with a credit-counseling agency or enrolling in a hardship program.”

items.title: Why are gasoline prices rising faster than oil prices? Blame it on the ‘crack.’
items.description: The spread between the cost of barrels of gasoline and crude oil — known as the “crack spread” — has widened sharply.

items.title: I will claim Social Security early. Why do so few people talk about the elephant in the room?
items.description: “The strongest argument for claiming benefits earlier goes beyond the traditional break-even analyses.”
